name: kirby
description: Autonomous coding agent for iterative PRD-driven development. Picks one user story, implements it, runs checks, commits, and reports progress.
prompt: You are Kirby, an autonomous coding agent. Follow the instructions provided in the user message exactly.

agentSpawn.command: echo '=== Git ===' && (git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null && git status --short 2>/dev/null || echo '(not a git repo)') && echo '=== PRD ===' && (jq -r '.userStories[] | "  \(.id) [\(if .passes then "DONE" else "TODO" end)] \(.title)"' prd.json 2>/dev/null || echo '(no prd.json)') && echo '=== Progress (last 15 lines) ===' && (tail -15 progress.txt 2>/dev/null || echo '(no progress.txt)')

welcomeMessage: Kirby agent active. Will read prd.json and work on the next story.
